Billing Settings

The Billing Settings page (/settings/billing) controls the default accounts used on sales invoices, when billing periods start, the fallback payment term, and which email template is used when sending invoices to clients.

Default accounts

Three GL accounts can be configured as system-wide defaults for the billing module:

SettingNotes
Default receivable accountThe accounts receivable control account used on new sales invoices when the client has no default receivable account set. Must be an asset account.
Default bank accountThe bank account pre-filled in the payment recording form when a client pays a sales invoice.
Tax liability accountThe GL account used to post the VAT/GST liability on sales invoices.

All three default to null (unset). The billing module will work without them, but you will need to select accounts manually on each invoice or payment until they are configured.

Billing period day

The billing period day (default: 1) sets the day of the month on which billing periods begin. This value is used by the "Beginning of Next Billing Period" payment term rule and by recurring invoice schedules when the frequency is set to monthly with a billing-period-based start day. For example, a billing period day of 1 means billing periods start on the 1st of each month.

Default payment term

The default payment term is applied to new sales invoices when neither the client nor the invoice itself specifies a payment term. Select a term from the list of terms defined in Payment Terms. Leave unset to require explicit selection on each invoice.

Invoice email template

When you send a sales invoice by email, Merlin renders an Unlayer email template. The template to use is selected by this setting. Create and manage templates in the Emails › Templates section (the NettMail admin area), then return here to set which template is used for invoice emails. See Email (NettMail).

Settings reference

KeyTypeDefault
billing_period_dayinteger (1–28)1
default_receivable_account_idUUID or nullnull
default_bank_account_idUUID or nullnull
default_payment_term_idUUID or nullnull
tax_liability_account_idUUID or nullnull
invoice_email_template_idUUID or nullnull
